section_header: Key actions related to Smart & Clean growth
extraction_rationale: Explicit commitment to produce a new action plan with defined contents and a specified first-phase timeline.

policy_statement: Use procurements and other steering measures to support creation of markets for new products and services that help residents, companies, and communities reduce their own emissions.
verbatim_text: 124. With procurements and available steering measures and other means, the City will support the creation of a market for new products and services that residents, companies and communities can use to reduce their own emissions.
section_header: Key actions related to Smart & Clean growth
extraction_rationale: Specific intervention using procurement and steering to shape markets for emissions-reducing solutions.

policy_statement: Provide residents with opportunities to influence and participate in development of new Smart & Clean solutions in an economically sustainable manner.
verbatim_text: 125. The residents are given opportunities to influence and participate in the development of new Smart & Clean solutions in an economically sustainable manner.
section_header: Key actions related to Smart & Clean growth
extraction_rationale: Commitment to a participation mechanism (opportunities for residents) tied to solution development.

policy_statement: Create operational models and criteria that enable the City to achieve economic policy objectives simultaneously with emissions reduction actions.
verbatim_text: 126. The City organisation will create operation models and criteria that enable the City to achieve its economic policy objectives simultaneously with the emissions reduction actions.
section_header: Key actions related to Smart & Clean growth
extraction_rationale: Concrete commitment to develop models and criteria integrating economic and climate objectives.

policy_statement: Provide companies domestic market references and opportunities to develop solutions in Helsinki, and promote the Helsinki region’s international pioneer reputation to support company international growth and regional appeal.
verbatim_text: 127. Companies will receive domestic market references, which will help with export. Domestic and international companies will be given opportunities to develop new solutions and operation models in Helsinki. The reputation of the Helsinki region as an international pioneer will be promoted, which will support the international growth of companies, as well as the appeal of the region.
section_header: Key actions related to Smart & Clean growth
extraction_rationale: Specific economic-development measures linked to climate/circular economy solutions and export references.

policy_statement: Systematically develop Smart & Clean joint development platforms and increase their effectiveness, considering urban development, company reference opportunities, international business potential, investments, and the City’s brand.
verbatim_text: 128. The City will systematically develop its Smart & Clean joint development platforms and increase their effectiveness in the development of climate and circular economy solutions. The functionality of the platforms will take into account urban development, the companies' reference opportunities, the international business potential of the platforms, investments and the City's brand.
section_header: Key actions related to Smart & Clean growth
extraction_rationale: Concrete commitment to develop platforms as an enabling instrument for climate and circular economy solutions.

policy_statement: Require Helsinki Group subsidiary communities and joint municipal authorities to integrate emissions reduction policies into their control systems, with a minimum objective of carbon-neutrality by 2035.
verbatim_text: 129. The organisations, subsidiary communities and joint municipal authorities of the Helsinki Group will be required to integrate the emissions reduction policies into their respective control systems. The minimum objective is to reach carbon-neutrality by 2035.
section_header: Key actions related to Smart & Clean growth
extraction_rationale: Binding requirement directed at Helsinki Group entities, including a minimum quantified objective (carbon-neutrality by 2035).

policy_statement: Take impacts on carbon storage into account in designing urban forests and green zones and add procedures to compensate for carbon storage lost during construction.
verbatim_text: 130. The impact on carbon storage will be taken into account when designing urban forests and nature and public green zones. Planning and green zone design will be complemented with procedures to compensate for the carbon storage lost during construction.
section_header: ## Key actions related to carbon sinks
extraction_rationale: Specific land-use planning commitment including introducing compensation procedures for construction-related carbon storage loss.

policy_statement: Implement the forest network in the Helsinki city plan by reforesting open spots and adding tree stands that do not reduce solar power potential.
verbatim_text: 131. The forest network in the Helsinki city plan (including conservation areas and forests in the green network) will be implemented by reforesting open spots and complementing the city structure with tree stands that do not cast shadow on the solar power potential.
section_header: ## Key actions related to carbon sinks
extraction_rationale: Concrete implementation actions (reforesting, complementing with tree stands) tied to an existing city plan network.

policy_statement: Maintain City-owned forests and wooded areas (including outside city borders) as vegetative, covered, and diverse through sustainable forestry and multiple tree species.
verbatim_text: 132. Forests and wooded areas owned by the City (including City-owned areas outside the City borders) will be kept vegetative, covered and diverse with various tree species and sustainable forestry.
section_header: ## Key actions related to carbon sinks
extraction_rationale: Specific forest management commitment describing desired ecological conditions and management approach.

policy_statement: Increase the number of fruit trees, decorative trees, useful plants and shrubs that provide climate-friendly local food on plots through awareness-raising and other communication.
verbatim_text: 133. The number of fruit trees, decorative trees, useful plants and shrubs that offer climatefriendly local food will be increased on plots through raising of awareness and other forms of communication.
section_header: ## Key actions related to carbon sinks
extraction_rationale: Actionable commitment (increase plantings) with an implementation mechanism (communication/awareness).

policy_statement: Use Helsinki’s green factor method in planning and implementing new plots to ensure sufficient green structures on each plot.
verbatim_text: 134. The planning and implementation of new plots will use Helsinki's green factor method to ensure sufficient green structures on each plot.
section_header: ## Key actions related to carbon sinks
extraction_rationale: Specific procedural requirement to apply an existing method (green factor) in plot planning/implementation.

policy_statement: Update the estimate of Helsinki’s carbon storage and carbon sinks each council term, examine the full carbon sink potential of the Helsinki Group, and develop calculation and reporting methods for shared metropolitan-area carbon storage and sinks.
verbatim_text: 135. An estimate of Helsinki's carbon storage and carbon sinks will be updated each council term, and the full carbon sink potential of the Helsinki Group will be examined. The calculation methods for and reporting on the shared carbon storage and carbon sinks of the metropolitan area will be developed.
extraction_rationale: Concrete monitoring/reporting commitment with a clear recurrence (each council term) and specified scope (Helsinki Group and metro area).

policy_statement: Finish adaptation policies and bring them into decision-making simultaneously with the Carbon-neutral Helsinki 2035 Action Plan during the current council term (2017–2021).
verbatim_text:
137. The adaptation policies will be finished and brought into the decision-making process simultaneously with the Carbon-neutral Helsinki 2035 Action Plan.

Time span:

Current council term (2017-2021).
section_header: ## Key actions related to the adaptation to climate change
extraction_rationale: Specific deliverable (finish adaptation policies) with timing (2017–2021) and a defined decision-making linkage.

policy_statement: Set sector-specific emissions reduction objectives in the City’s operational and economic planning.
verbatim_text: 142. In its operational and economic planning, the City will set sector-specific objectives in terms of emissions reductions.
section_header: ## Key actions related to the coordination of climate work
extraction_rationale: Concrete planning requirement to establish sector-specific emissions objectives.

policy_statement: Establish a group or forum to facilitate cooperation between the City, businesses and other interest groups and to support monitoring/sparring related to the Action Plan, and develop new ways to discuss climate matters.
verbatim_text: 143. A group or forum will be established to facilitate the cooperation between the City, businesses and other interest groups, as well as the monitoring and sparring related to the Action Plan. In addition to this, new ways to discuss climate matters will be developed.
section_header: ## Key actions related to the coordination of climate work
extraction_rationale: Specific institutional commitment (establish a forum) with defined purposes (cooperation, monitoring, sparring).

policy_statement: Adopt open policy practice tools and principles for monitoring the Action Plan and create an operational monitoring model to ensure current information is available for implementing and updating the Action Plan.
verbatim_text: 144. Open policy practice and the related tools and principles are adopted in monitoring of the Action Plan. An operation model for the monitoring of the Action Plan will be created to ensure that the best and current information is always available. The operation model will be used when implementing and updating the Action Plan.
extraction_rationale: Concrete governance/process commitment: adoption of open policy practice and creation of a monitoring operational model.

policy_statement: Adopt and use new assessment tools for monitoring progress, costs, benefits and emissions development of actions, and for tracking impacts such as green jobs, air quality and health.
verbatim_text: 145. New assessment tools will be adopted and used for the monitoring of the progress, costs, benefits and emission development of the actions, as well as the development of green jobs, air quality, health impacts and other impacts.
section_header: ## Key actions related to reporting and impact assessment
extraction_rationale: Specific commitment to adopt tools covering defined monitoring dimensions and co-benefits.

policy_statement: Develop an operational model for annual reporting of Helsinki Group operations and finances in terms of emissions reduction, for example as part of environmental reporting.
verbatim_text: 146. An operation model will be developed for the annual reporting of the operations and finances of the Helsinki Group in terms of emissions reduction; for example, as a part of environmental reporting.
section_header: ## Key actions related to reporting and impact assessment
extraction_rationale: Concrete administrative action to create an annual reporting model with a defined subject (emissions reduction in operations/finances).

policy_statement: Carry out an assessment of the Action Plan during each council term.
verbatim_text:
## 147. Assessment of the Action Plan during each council term.

Parties responsible: Services and Permits / Environ- mental Services.
extraction_rationale: Clear recurring commitment (each council term) to perform an effectiveness assessment of the Action Plan.
